growth_news.title: AI helps discover life-saving medicines faster!
growth_news.description: Imagine having to test millions of keys to find one that unlocks a cure. AI acts like a super-scanner that finds the perfect keys in seconds, helping scientists make new medicines way faster than before!

growth_news.title: Google Gemini brings AI magic to the World Cup!
growth_news.description: Soccer fans are getting a high-tech treat as Google's Gemini AI joins the World Cup to help analyze plays and share fun stats. It is like having a super-smart robot assistant sitting next to you explaining every kick!

growth_news.title: How AI is helping doctors make better health choices
growth_news.description: A new study shows that people are using AI to understand their health better, helping them make smarter decisions when talking to doctors. It's like having a friendly, always-available digital nurse to help you understand your symptoms!

tech_news.title: Anthropic releases powerful new AI model to the public
tech_news.description: Anthropic has made its highly-anticipated new AI model available for everyone to try. This system works like a super-powered digital brain that can tackle complex coding, logic, and writing tasks with ease.

tech_news.title: AI pioneer Rich Sutton talks about AI creativity
tech_news.description: Famous AI scientist Rich Sutton discussed how computers are learning to invent new ideas instead of just copying humans. This means future AIs might help us solve math puzzles we've never been able to crack!

tech_news.title: New York ads now must label AI art
tech_news.description: A new law in New York says that advertisements must clearly state when they use AI-generated pictures or videos. This is like adding a 'made by robots' sticker so viewers always know what is real and what is digital magic.

jargons.definition: A computer system styled after the human brain that learns by processing examples.
jargons.example: Imagine a tower of Lego blocks where each block passes a secret whisper to the block above it until the top block makes a smart guess.
jargons.use_case: Teaching computers to recognize pictures of kittens versus puppies.

jargons.definition: An AI mechanism that helps computers focus on the most important words in a sentence.
jargons.example: When reading the sentence 'The bank of the river,' attention helps the AI realize 'bank' means the edge of water, not a place with money.
jargons.use_case: Helping language models translate books into different languages perfectly.

jargons.definition: An 'open-book' approach where an AI looks up trustworthy facts before answering your questions.
jargons.example: Like looking up a chapter in your favorite encyclopedia to make sure your science report is 100% correct.
jargons.use_case: Powering smart search engines that answer school questions with direct quotes from articles.

jargons.definition: A learning style where an AI tries things out and gets positive points for correct moves.
jargons.example: Training a puppy to roll over by giving it delicious treats when it does the trick correctly.
jargons.use_case: Teaching virtual robots how to walk, run, and jump over obstacles in video games.

jargons.definition: Taking a smart general AI and giving it extra training to turn it into an absolute expert in one field.
jargons.example: Taking a college student who loves science and sending them to a specialized camp to become a rocket engineer.
jargons.use_case: Helping general AI chatbots become super-accurate medical assistants for doctors.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.trending_factor: This smart code editor helps kids and creators write software easily by suggesting and writing blocks of code instantly.

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.trending_factor: It can magically turn your homework notes and study guides into a fun, realistic radio podcast featuring AI hosts!

tools.name: v0
tools.trending_factor: Just type a description of the website you want to make, and v0 builds the code and design in front of your eyes.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.trending_factor: Creators love it because it transforms simple text descriptions into jaw-dropping, high-quality illustrations and concept art.

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.trending_factor: It generates incredibly realistic voices that can read stories out loud, making game development and audiobooks super easy to create.
